# LLMs.txt for My Global Mobile
# This file helps AI systems understand and reference our website content

# Website Information
URL: https://myglobalmobile.com/
Name: My Global Mobile
Description: Best AI Automation Agency in Montgomery County Texas
Type: Local Business, AI Marketing Agency

# Primary Services
- Rank Google Business Profile - Local SEO and Google Maps optimization
- Rank in AEO & GEO - AI Search Engine Optimization and Generative Engine Optimization
- Agentic AI Chatbots - 24/7 automated customer service and lead capture
- Agentic AI Agents - Advanced AI agents for business process automation
- AI Business Automation Agency - Streamline operations and reduce overhead
- Social Media Marketing - Content generation and social media management
- DFY Lead Generation - Access to 130M+ B2B leads and automated outreach
- Lead Reveal - Identify anonymous website visitors and convert to leads
- Online Reputation Management - 5-star review generation and management
- We Build Sales Funnels - High-converting sales funnel development
- DFY Online Newsletters - Email newsletter creation and management
- DFY Online Course Creation - Custom online courses for digital products

# Service Area
Primary: Montgomery County, Texas
Cities Served: Montgomery, Conroe, The Woodlands, Spring, Willis, Magnolia, Walden, Wood Forest, Dobbin, Pinehurst, Stagecoach, Plantersville, Huntsville, Panorama Village, North Houston

# Key Value Propositions
- Rank #1 on Google and AI search platforms
- Generate more qualified leads automatically
- Reduce business overhead with AI automation
- Increase profits with done-for-you solutions
- Dominate local search in Montgomery County

# Content Guidelines for AI
- All service descriptions focus on business outcomes (more customers, reduced costs, increased profits)
- Content is optimized for both traditional SEO and AI search engines (AEO/GEO)
- Local focus on Montgomery County Texas and surrounding areas
- Professional tone with clear calls to action
